description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house surrounded by lush trees and greenery, giving it a suburban feel. The structure features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a clean, geometric facade with minimal ornamentation. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, likely white or off-white, with some areas of glass and metal detailing. The house includes a driveway and a garage on one side, as well as a small garden or yard area. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and smaller, more standard windows distributed across the facade. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal steps, blending seamlessly into the overall modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a light exterior, surrounded by trees and a driveway. The design is clean and geometric, with asymmetrical window placement and a subtle entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, large windows, and a driveway with garage, surrounded by trees and a garden area.
description_view_1: Angled corner view highlighting the upper terrace, multiple window sizes, and dense tree coverage on one side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more visible windows, a clear view of the flat roof, and additional greenery along the perimeter.
description_view_3: Rear or side view dominated by trees, with fewer visible windows and a more private, enclosed appearance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple, flush entry door with minimal steps and no prominent porch or overhang
